creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I am also not able to reproduce the problem with the same options you chose.  

http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/11amd64-default/2017-06-17_21h13m57s/logs/R-3.4.0.log

However, there are few things that we should investigate.

1. You are building an older version, 3.3.3_1.  Could you update your ports tree?
2. You have a lot of customizations in make.conf.  Could you (temporarily) remove them?
